classes.label: Land
classes.description: A piece of land associated with an educational institution.

classes.label: Building
classes.description: A structure or building within the institution.

classes.label: Room
classes.description: A room located within a building.

classes.label: Building Renovation
classes.description: A record of renovation or repair work performed on a building.

classes.label: Facility
classes.description: A facility or infrastructure asset of the institution.

classes.label: Equipment
classes.description: An instrument, device, or piece of equipment.

classes.label: Equipment Attachment
classes.description: An accessory or attachment belonging to a piece of equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Land Address
datatype_properties.description: The address of the land.

datatype_properties.label: Land Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: The certificate number for the land.

datatype_properties.label: Building Ownership Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the ownership of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Building Usage Status Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the usage status of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Building Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the category of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Building Structure Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the structure type of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Building Floors
datatype_properties.description: Number of floors in the building, including basement.

datatype_properties.label: Building Completion Date
datatype_properties.description: The year and month the building was completed.

datatype_properties.label: Building Total Investment
datatype_properties.description: Total investment amount for the building in Yuan.

datatype_properties.label: Building Funding Source Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the source of funding for the building.

datatype_properties.label: Building Total Floor Area
datatype_properties.description: Total floor area of the building in square meters.

datatype_properties.label: Building Total Usable Area
datatype_properties.description: Total usable area of the building in square meters.

datatype_properties.label: Building Seismic Intensity Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for seismic fortification intensity.

datatype_properties.label: Building Seismic Standard Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for seismic fortification standard.

datatype_properties.label: Building Condition Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the condition of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Building Photo
datatype_properties.description: Photo of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Building Floor Plan
datatype_properties.description: Architectural floor plan of the building.
evidence: 指建筑物的建筑平面图

datatype_properties.label: Building Ownership Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: Ownership certificate number for the building.

datatype_properties.label: Building Footprint Area
datatype_properties.description: Land area occupied by the building in square meters.

datatype_properties.label: Building Design Life
datatype_properties.description: Design service life of the building in years.

datatype_properties.label: Room Usage Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the usage of the room.

datatype_properties.label: Room Floor
datatype_properties.description: Floor where the room is located.

datatype_properties.label: Room Building Area
datatype_properties.description: Building area of the room in square meters.

datatype_properties.label: Room Usable Area
datatype_properties.description: Usable area of the room in square meters.

datatype_properties.label: Renovation Start Date
datatype_properties.description: Start date of the renovation.

datatype_properties.label: Renovation End Date
datatype_properties.description: End date of the renovation.

datatype_properties.label: Renovation Content
datatype_properties.description: Description of the renovation content.

datatype_properties.label: Renovation Cost
datatype_properties.description: Total cost of the renovation in Yuan.
evidence: 指修缮涉及的经费总额，单位：元

datatype_properties.label: Renovation Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the unit undertaking the renovation.
evidence: 承担修缮任务的单位名称

datatype_properties.label: Renovation Handler ID
datatype_properties.description: Employee ID of the person handling the renovation.
evidence: 办理修缮手续及相关事宜的人员的工号

datatype_properties.label: Renovation Note
datatype_properties.description: Notes related to the renovation.
evidence: 与修缮相关的情况说明

datatype_properties.label: Facility Ownership Code
datatype_properties.description: Ownership code of the facility.

datatype_properties.label: Facility Usage Status Code
datatype_properties.description: Usage status code of the facility.

datatype_properties.label: Facility Unit Hierarchy Code
datatype_properties.description: Hierarchy code of the school unit the facility belongs to.

datatype_properties.label: Facility Construction Date
datatype_properties.description: Year and month the facility was constructed.

datatype_properties.label: Facility Construction Cost
datatype_properties.description: Total construction cost of the facility in Yuan.
evidence: 指建成设施的总经费，单位：元

datatype_properties.label: Facility Repair Date
datatype_properties.description: Year and month the facility was repaired.

datatype_properties.label: Facility Repair Cost
datatype_properties.description: Total repair cost of the facility in Yuan.
evidence: 指修缮设施的总经费，单位：元

datatype_properties.label: Facility Usage Normal
datatype_properties.description: Whether the facility is in normal usage (1=Normal, 0=Abnormal).

datatype_properties.label: Equipment English Name
datatype_properties.description: English name of the equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Unit Hierarchy Code
datatype_properties.description: Hierarchy code of the school unit the equipment belongs to.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Ownership Code
datatype_properties.description: Ownership code of the equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Classification code of the equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Model
datatype_properties.description: Model of the equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Manufacture Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the equipment was manufactured.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Country/Region Code
datatype_properties.description: Three-letter code of the country where the equipment was produced.
evidence: 指仪器的生产国，用三位字母代码

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Funding Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the funding category of the equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Purchase Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the equipment was purchased.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Manufacturer
datatype_properties.description: Name of the manufacturer.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Factory Number
datatype_properties.description: Unique factory number of the equipment.
evidence: 厂家标注在产品上的唯一号

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Document Number
datatype_properties.description: Purchase document or contract number.
evidence: 采购凭证单据号或进口产品订货合同号

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Photo
datatype_properties.description: Photo of the equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Location
datatype_properties.description: Location of the equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Manager ID
datatype_properties.description: Employee ID of the equipment manager.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Technical Specs
datatype_properties.description: Technical specifications of the equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Configuration
datatype_properties.description: Configuration details of the equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Price Currency
datatype_properties.description: Currency of the equipment price.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Price
datatype_properties.description: Price of the equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Note
datatype_properties.description: Notes about the equipment.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Financial Account ID
datatype_properties.description: Internal financial account ID.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Supplier
datatype_properties.description: Name of the supplier.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Warranty Expiry Date
datatype_properties.description: Warranty expiration date.

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Source
datatype_properties.description: Source of the equipment (e.g., purchase, donation).
evidence: 如：盘盈、外购、调入、转入、捐赠、自制自建、其他

datatype_properties.label: Equipment Is Precious
datatype_properties.description: Whether the equipment is a precious/valuable instrument.

datatype_properties.label: Attachment Quantity
datatype_properties.description: Total quantity of the attachment.
evidence: 某仪器设备附件的总数量，单位：个

datatype_properties.label: Attachment Model/Spec
datatype_properties.description: Model and specification of the attachment.

datatype_properties.label: Attachment Price
datatype_properties.description: Price of the attachment.

datatype_properties.label: Attachment English Name
datatype_properties.description: English name of the attachment.

datatype_properties.label: Attachment Total Price (RMB)
datatype_properties.description: Total price in RMB.

object_properties.label: located on
object_properties.description: Indicates the land on which a building is located.

object_properties.label: contains room
object_properties.description: Indicates that a building contains a room.
evidence: 建议前6位为建筑物编号

object_properties.label: has renovation
object_properties.description: Indicates renovation records associated with a building.

object_properties.label: has attachment
object_properties.description: Indicates attachments belonging to a piece of equipment.

relations.subject: Building
evidence: 建议前6位为建筑物编号
